rules.label: Social media pattern
rules.message: Predictive Alert: Your social media pattern is currently the strongest driver of your risk. A short break or a smaller session target could help you feel more in control.

rules.label: Daily screen time
rules.message: Proactive Nudge: Your total screen time is running high right now. A few deliberate offline breaks through the day could ease that load.

rules.label: Sleep routine
rules.message: Wellbeing Insight: Your sleep routine may be making digital habits harder to regulate. A steadier wind-down could help you feel more settled tomorrow.

rules.label: Frequent app checking
rules.message: Behavioral Trigger: Frequent app checking is adding extra switch-tasking pressure. A quieter notification window or a short focus block could help.

high.label: Your current signals
high.message: Your habits could use a little extra support right now. One small boundary you can keep this week is a good place to begin.

moderate_stress.label: Stress level
moderate_stress.message: Your habits look manageable overall, though stress may be making them harder to regulate. Gentle boundaries during stressful moments could help most.

moderate.label: Current balance
moderate.message: Your habits are fairly steady, with a few signs of drift. Easing back on one repetitive behaviour could improve balance quite quickly.

low.label: Current balance
low.message: Your current pattern looks balanced. Keeping your sleep and screen routines steady should help you stay comfortable and in control.
